keys.backupCreated: कुञ्जी ब्याकअप सिर्जना र डाउनलोड गरियो ✓
keys.restored: Key backup restored ✓ Keys installed locally
keys.noBackup: No encrypted backup exists for this account
keys.missingPublicKey: Backup is missing a public key

keySetup.title: आफ्नो डिभाइस कुञ्जीहरू सेट अप गर्नुहोस्
keySetup.description: यो डिभाइसमा तपाईंको निजी कुञ्जी अझै छैन। पासवर्ड-सुरक्षित ब्याकअप आयात गर्नुहोस्, वा नयाँ कुञ्जी-जोडी बनाउनुहोस् (अबदेखि तपाईंले नयाँ सन्देशहरू पढ्न सक्नुहुनेछ)।
keySetup.chooseFile: एउटा फाइल छान्नुहोस् र पासवर्ड प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस्।
keySetup.imported: Private key imported to this device. You can read old messages now.
keySetup.enterPassword: Enter your account password so we can back up your keys securely.

encryptionRecovery.title: Manage Encryption
encryptionRecovery.description: Back up, restore, unlock, or reset your encryption key.

alert.keyRequiredBody: This browser cannot currently decrypt your encrypted messages. Restore, unlock, or reset your key to continue.
alert.lockedBody: Restore or unlock your encryption key to read encrypted messages on this device.

unlockPasscode.label: Unlock passcode (current device)
unlockPasscode.description: Used to decrypt your keys locally before exporting

backupPassword.label: Backup password
backupPassword.description: Used to encrypt the backup file

restoreBackupPassword.label: Backup password
restoreBackupPassword.description: The password you created when backing up your key on iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: New local passcode
newLocalPasscode.description: Protect keys at rest on this browser

resetLocalPasscode.label: New local passcode
resetLocalPasscode.description: Required before resetting so the new key is protected on this device

devicePasscode.label: Device passcode
devicePasscode.description: Enter the passcode used to protect keys on this device.

newDevicePasscode.label: New device passcode
newDevicePasscode.description: Create a passcode to protect keys on this device.

resetDevicePasscode.label: New device passcode
resetDevicePasscode.description: Create a passcode for the new encryption key on this device.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Key restore incomplete or incorrect for this account
errors.noBackup: No encrypted backup exists for this account
errors.missingPublicKey: Backup is missing a public key
errors.noServerPublicKey: This account does not currently expose a server public key
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server backup does not match the current account encryption key
errors.resetIncomplete: Encryption reset did not complete correctly
errors.resetFailed: Could not reset encryption. Please try again.
errors.restoreFailed: Could not restore your encryption key. Check your backup and password.
errors.unlockFailed: Could not unlock your encryption key. Check your passcode and try again.

confirm.reset:
Reset encryption for this account?

Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: This generates a new encryption key for your account. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.

danger.title: Start fresh encryption
danger.body: This creates a new encryption key. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Use your device passcode or restore a backup to unlock encrypted messages.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Restore your encrypted chat key from a backup protected by your backup password.

smsConsent.label: म {{companyName}} बाट SMS सूचना र अलर्टहरू प्राप्त गर्न सहमत छु। सन्देशको आवृत्ति फरक हुन सक्छ। सन्देश र डाटा शुल्क लाग्न सक्छ। कुनै पनि समयमा सदस्यता रद्द गर्न <stop>STOP</stop> मा जवाफ दिनुहोस्। मद्दतको लागि <help>HELP</help> मा जवाफ दिनुहोस्।

phoneField.label: फोन
phoneField.hint: समावेश गर्नुहोस् आवश्यक परेमा देश कोड (जस्तै, +१ ४१५…)

auth.headline: कसैको लागि पनि, जहाँसुकै सुरक्षित सन्देश
auth.description: एन्ड-टु-एन्ड इन्क्रिप्सन, १००+ भाषामा अनुवाद, हराउँदै जाने सन्देशहरू, र भ्वाइस/भिडियो कल।

hero.line1: कसैको लागि, जहाँसुकै सुरक्षित सन्देश — सँग
hero.sub: विश्वभरि Wi-Fi वा डाटामा कल गर्न र टेक्स्ट गर्न निःशुल्क सुरक्षित फोन नम्बर प्राप्त गर्नुहोस्। अन्त-देखि-अन्त इन्क्रिप्सन, हराउने सन्देशहरू, र HD भ्वाइस/भिडियो कलको आनन्द लिनुहोस् — यी सबैमा निर्मित उपकरणहरू छन् जसले तपाईंलाई सीमानाहरू पार गरेर पनि जडान रहन मद्दत गर्दछ।
hero.freeNote: साधारण कल र टेक्स्ट निःशुल्क छन्। उन्नत AI र प्रिमियम सुविधाहरूका लागि अपग्रेड आवश्यक पर्दछ।

auth.desktopTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.
auth.scanHelper: डेस्कटपमा हुनुहुन्छ? एप पाउन आफ्नो फोनले स्क्यान गर्नुहोस्।
auth.subhead: निजी, इन्क्रिप्टेड, र अनुवाद गरिएको सन्देश — तुरुन्तै।
auth.tip: सुझाव: वेब र मोबाइलमा एउटै खाता प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। तपाईंको सन्देशहरू सिङ्क रहन्छन्।
auth.scanHint: एप डाउनलोड गर्न वा आफ्नो ब्राउजरमा खोल्न स्क्यान गर्नुहोस्।

registration.passwordDescription: न्यूनतम ६ अक्षर। बलियो, अद्वितीय पासवर्ड प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।
registration.smsConsent: खाता बनाएर, तपाईं आफ्नो Chatforia गतिविधि (जस्तै अन्य प्रयोगकर्ताहरूबाट सन्देशहरू) सँग सम्बन्धित SMS सूचनाहरू प्राप्त गर्न सहमत हुनुहुन्छ। सन्देश र डाटा शुल्क लाग्न सक्छ। तपाईंले कुनै पनि समयमा सेटिङ्समा अप्ट आउट गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।
registration.phoneHelp: प्रमाणीकरण, सुरक्षा, र समर्थित ठाउँमा SMS सुविधाहरूको लागि प्रयोग गरिन्छ।
registration.title: आफ्नो Chatforia खाता सिर्जना गर्नुहोस्

auth.addRecipient: सुरु गर्नको लागि माथि कुनै प्राप्तकर्ता थप्नुहोस्…
auth.oneRecipient: कृपया अहिलेको लागि एक प्राप्तकर्ता प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस्।
auth.enterValidRecipient: सुरक्षित सम्पर्कको नाम वा फोन नम्बर प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस्।
auth.sendFailed: पठाउन असफल भयो। विवरणको लागि कन्सोल जाँच गर्नुहोस्।

errors.emailTaken: त्यो इमेल पहिले नै प्रयोगमा छ।
errors.invalidInput: कृपया आफ्नो जानकारी जाँच गर्नुहोस् र फेरि प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।
errors.invalidPhone: एक मान्य फोन नम्बर प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस्।
errors.registrationFailed: दर्ता असफल भयो। कृपया फेरि प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।
errors.smsConsent: जारी राख्न कृपया एसएमएस सहमति स्वीकार गर्नुहोस्।
errors.tooManyAttempts: धेरै प्रयासहरू भए। कृपया पर्खनुहोस् र फेरि प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।
errors.usernameOrEmailTaken: त्यो प्रयोगकर्ता नाम वा इमेल पहिले नै लिइएको छ।
errors.usernameTaken: त्यो प्रयोगकर्ता नाम पहिले नै लिइएको छ।

login.title: Chatforia मा जारी राख्नुहोस्
login.subtitleReturning: तपाईंको Chatforia खातामा लग इन गर्नुहोस्
login.ssoUnavailable: सिङ्गल-साइन-अन हाल उपलब्ध छैन। यसको सट्टा प्रयोगकर्ता नाम र पासवर्ड प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

verification.sent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

error.unprocessable: अमान्य अनुरोध। आफ्नो प्रयोगकर्ता नाम/इमेल र पासवर्ड जाँच गर्नुहोस्।
error.deviceLimit: नि:शुल्क योजनाको लागि उपकरण सीमा पूरा भयो। अर्को उपकरणमा लग आउट गर्नुहोस् वा थप उपकरणहरू लिंक गर्न प्रिमियममा अपग्रेड गर्नुहोस्।
error.premiumRequired: This action requires a Premium plan.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.helper: Enter the email you used to create your Chatforia account and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: कृपया मान्य इमेल ठेगाना प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस्।
forgotPassword.genericError: Unable to process request. Please try again in a moment.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: यदि त्यो इमेलसँग खाता छ भने, हामीले पासवर्ड रिसेट लिङ्क पठाएका छौं। यो आउन केही मिनेट लाग्न सक्छ। आफ्नो स्प्याम वा प्रमोशन्स फोल्डर जाँच गर्न नबिर्सनुहोस्।

resetPassword.title: पासवर्ड रिसेट गर्नुहोस्
resetPassword.missingToken: अमान्य वा हराएको पासवर्ड रिसेट टोकन।
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: अमान्य वा हराएको टोकन। कृपया नयाँ पासवर्ड रिसेट लिङ्क अनुरोध गर्नुहोस्।
resetPassword.success: तपाईंको पासवर्ड सफलतापूर्वक रिसेट गरिएको छ
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: अन्यत्र प्रयोग नगर्ने बलियो पासवर्ड छान्नुहोस्।

home.messagesSubtitle: माथि प्राप्तकर्ताको नाम लेख्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि कुराकानी सुरु गर्न सन्देश पठाउनुहोस्।

startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Type a name, username, phone, or email…

startChatModal.searchPrompt: प्रयोगकर्ता नाम वा फोन नम्बर टाइप गर्नुहोस् र खोज्नुहोस् थिच्नुहोस्।

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: उपनाम, नाम, प्रयोगकर्ता नाम, वा फोनद्वारा बचत गरिएका सम्पर्कहरू खोज्नुहोस्
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: आफ्नो सम्पर्कहरू व्यवस्थापन गर्नुहोस् र साथीहरूलाई निमन्त्रणा गर्नुहोस्।
peoplePage.inviteDesc: तत्काल कुराकानी सुरु गर्न आफ्नो निमन्त्रणा लिङ्क साझा गर्नुहोस्।
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: iOS र Android को लागि Chatforia सँग जहाँसुकैबाट सम्पर्कमा रहनुहोस्।
peoplePage.syncTip: सुझाव: तपाईंको सन्देशहरू वेब र मोबाइलमा सिङ्क रहन्छन्।

profile.title: प्रयोगकर्ता प्रोफाइल
profile.mustLogin: सेटिङहरू हेर्न तपाईंले साइन इन गर्नुपर्छ।
profile.noPrivateKey: यस उपकरणमा निर्यात गर्न कुनै निजी कुञ्जी छैन।
profile.setBackupPassword: तपाईंको ब्याकअप इन्क्रिप्ट गर्न पासवर्ड सेट गर्नुहोस्:
profile.importSuccess: निजी कुञ्जी यस उपकरणमा आयात भयो।
profile.importFailed: कुञ्जी आयात गर्न असफल भयो (गलत पासवर्ड वा बिग्रिएको फाइल)।
profile.keysRotated: नयाँ की पेयर (key pair) उत्पन्न भयो र सार्वजनिक कुञ्जी अपलोड गरियो।
profile.keyDisclaimer: तपाईंको निजी कुञ्जीले यो उपकरण कहिल्यै छोड्दैन। पुनर्स्थापना गर्न पासवर्ड-सुरक्षित प्रतिलिपि निर्यात गर्नुहोस् अर्को उपकरणमा यसलाई निर्यात गर्नुहोस्।
profile.themeFreeNotice: तपाईं निःशुल्क संस्करणमा हुनुहुन्छ—तलका द्रुत सूर्य/चन्द्र विकल्पहरू प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। थप थिमहरू अनलक गर्न अपग्रेड गर्नुहोस्।
profile.backupDesc: अर्को डिभाइसमा तपाईंको सन्देशहरू सुरक्षित रूपमा पुनर्स्थापना गर्न आफ्नो इन्क्रिप्शन कुञ्जी ब्याकअप गर्नुहोस्।
profile.planLoadFailed: तपाईंको योजना लोड गर्न असफल भयो।
profile.freePlanCopy: तपाईं निःशुल्क योजनामा हुनुहुन्छ। ब्याकअप जस्ता थप सुविधाहरू अनलक गर्न अपग्रेड गर्नुहोस्, थप नम्बरहरू, र उन्नत गोपनीयता विकल्पहरू।
profile.portalOpenFailed: बिलिङ पोर्टल खोल्न सकिएन। कृपया फेरि प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।
profile.notifyOnCopy: मेरो सन्देश प्रतिलिपि गरिएमा मलाई जानकारी दिनुहोस्
profile.followHint: Their stories will appear in your Following feed if they post with audience Followers (or Public).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Something went wrong in this section.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: आउने कल र टेक्स्टहरू तपाईंको प्रमाणित फोन वा इमेलमा फर्वार्ड गर्नुहोस्। बाहिर जाने कल/टेक्स्टहरूले तपाईंको Chatforia नम्बर देखाउन सक्छ।
profile.errE164: एक मान्य E.164 फोन नम्बर प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस् (जस्तै, +15551234567)।
profile.errSmsDest: कम्तिमा एउटा गन्तव्य (फोन वा इमेल) छान्नुहोस्।
profile.errQuietHours: शान्त समय ० र २३ को बीचमा हुनुपर्छ।
profile.ageBandHint: हामी केवल उमेरको दायरा मात्र भण्डारण गर्छौं (तपाईंको जन्म मिति होइन) । यो र्यान्डम च्याट जोडीहरूलाई उचित राख्न प्रयोग गरिन्छ।
profile.wantsAgeFilter: र्यान्डम च्याटमा उमेर-आधारित मिलान प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: जब यो अन हुन्छ, हामी तपाईंलाई उपयुक्त उमेर समूहका मानिसहरूसँग जोडी बनाउन प्रयास गर्छौं।
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: किशोरकिशोरीहरूलाई सधैं अन्य किशोरकिशोरीहरूसँग मात्र मिलाइन्छ। वयस्कहरूलाई किशोरकिशोरीहरूसँग मिलाउन सकिँदैन।
profile.teenMatchingNote: सुरक्षाको लागि, १३–१७ उमेर समूहका खाताहरूलाई र्‍यान्डम च्याटमा अन्य १३–१७ खाताहरूसँग मात्र मिलाउन सकिन्छ।
profile.foriaRemember: रियालाई तपाईंले बताउनुभएका कुराहरू याद राख्न दिनुहोस्
profile.foriaRememberDesc: जब यो अन हुन्छ, फोरियाले तपाईंको विगतका र्‍यान्डम च्याट कुराकानीहरू प्रयोग गर्न सक्छ (तपाईं सँग मात्र) कुराकानी निरन्तरता दिन। तपाईंले यसलाई कुनै पनि समयमा बन्द गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: तपाईंको अडियो अभिवादन उपलब्ध नभएको बेला प्रयोग गरिन्छ।
profile.voicemailNote: तपाईंको Chatforia नम्बरहरूबाट आउने भ्वाइसमेलहरू तपाईंको भ्वाइसमेल इनबक्समा भण्डारण गरिनेछ। तपाईंले समर्थित योजनाहरूमा ट्रान्सक्रिप्सन र फर्वार्डिङ सक्षम गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।
profile.portHint: आफ्नो हालको नम्बर राख्न चाहनुहुन्छ? तपाईंले यसलाई Chatforia Wireless मा पोर्ट गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।

esim.descActive: तपाईंको eSIM सक्रिय छ र व्यवस्थापन गर्न तयार छ।

accessibilitySettings.title: सुविधा र सूचनाहरू
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: ध्वनिमा निर्भर नगरी Chatforia लाई प्रयोग गर्न सजिलो बनाउने विकल्पहरू।
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: सामान्य आकारबाट सुरु हुन्छ। ठूलो टेक्स्ट मनपराउनुहुन्छ भने बढाउनुहोस्।
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: ब्यानरहरू र शीर्षक झिलिमिली देखाउँछ ताकि तपाईंले गतिविधि नछुटाउनुहोस्।
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: कल बजिरहेको बेला छोटो चम्किलो चमक
accessibilitySettings.enableLiveCaptions: कलको समयमा लाइभ क्याप्सन सक्षम गर्नुहोस् (प्रिमियम)
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: अर्को सहभागीको अडियोबाट वास्तविक-समय क्याप्सन देखाउनुहोस्।
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: तपाईंले प्राप्त गर्ने अडियो सन्देशहरूमा ट्रान्सक्रिप्ट संलग्न गर्नुहोस्।
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
आउने कलमा स्क्रिन चम्काउने
कल बजिरहेको बेला छोटो चम्किलो फ्ल्यास दिने।

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: सर्भरमा केवल साइफरटेक्स्ट (ciphertext) मात्र भण्डारण गर्नुहोस्। AI/Translate र मोडरेसन पूर्वावलोकनहरू निष्क्रिय गर्दछ।
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: कडा E2EE सक्षम छ। AI/Translate निष्क्रिय हुनेछ।
privacySection.strictE2EEDisabled: कडा E2EE असक्षम गरिएको छ। AI/अनुवाद पुनः सक्षम गरिएको छ।

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Manage your Chatforia mobile plan, numbers, forwarding, and number porting.

options.heading: Choose how you want to use Chatforia
options.subheading: You can get a new Chatforia number, or bring your existing number from another carrier.
options.portNumber: तपाईंको हालको नम्बर Chatforia Wireless मा पोर्ट गर्नुहोस्

port.heading: तपाईंको अवस्थित नम्बर पोर्ट गर्नुहोस्
port.subheading: आफ्नो हालको फोन नम्बर आफ्नो पुरानो क्यारियरबाट Chatforia मा सार्नुहोस्। ढिलाइ हुनबाट जोगिनका लागि विवरणहरू तपाईंको क्यारियर खातासँग ठ्याक्कै मिल्दोजुल्दो छन् भनी सुनिश्चित गर्नुहोस्।
port.success: पोर्ट अनुरोध पेश भयो! हामी तपाईंलाई जानकारी गराइरहनेछौं।

status.heading: पोर्टिङ स्थिति
status.subheading: Track the status of your number port requests.

wireless.exhausted: तपाईंको डाटा सकियो। मोबाइल डाटा प्रयोग गर्न जारी राख्न नयाँ प्याक किन्नुहोस्।
wireless.dashboardIntro: आफ्नो Chatforia मोबाइल डेटा, फोन नम्बर, eSIM सेटअप, र योजनाको स्थिति व्यवस्थापन गर्नुहोस्।

data.caption: Track your current data usage and remaining balance.
data.familyCaption: तपाईंको परिवारका सदस्यहरूबीच साझा गरिएको डाटा।

plan.title: प्लान
plan.noneBody: Chatforia Mobile सक्रिय गर्न डाटा प्याक छान्नुहोस्।
plan.noneBodyReady: पहिले आफ्नो eSIM सेटअप गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि तपाईं तयार भएपछि डाटा प्याक छान्नुहोस्।
plan.familyBody: यो प्लान साझा पारिवारिक डाटा पूलको हिस्सा हो।

esim.title: प्लान
esim.heading: Set up your eSIM
esim.subheading: यस उपकरणमा Chatforia Mobile डाटा प्रयोग गर्न आफ्नो eSIM इन्स्टल गर्नुहोस्।
esim.body: आफ्नो eSIM QR कोड उत्पन्न गर्नुहोस् वा खोल्नुहोस् र आफ्नो फोनमा सक्रियता निर्देशनहरू पालना गर्नुहोस्।
esim.readyBody: तपाईंको eSIM तयार छ। तपाईंले QR कोड खोल्न सक्नुहुन्छ वा आफ्नो मोबाइल प्लान व्यवस्थापन गर्न जारी राख्न सक्नुहुन्छ।

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.errorReserve: eSIM आरक्षित गर्न सकिएन। कृपया फेरि प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।
esim.iccidHint: ICCID ले यो eSIM प्रोफाइललाई अद्वितीय रूपमा पहिचान गर्छ।
esim.secrecyNote: यो QR कोड गोप्य राख्नुहोस्। पहुँच हुने जो कोहीले पनि eSIM स्थापना गर्न सक्छ।

instructions.step1: आफ्नो फोनको सेलुलर वा मोबाइल डाटा सेटिङहरू खोल्नुहोस्।
instructions.step2: eSIM थप्नुहोस् वा QR कोड स्क्यान गर्नुहोस् छान्नुहोस्।
instructions.step3: यो QR कोड स्क्यान गर्नुहोस् र सक्रियता पूरा गर्न स्क्रिनमा देखाइएका चरणहरू पालना गर्नुहोस्।

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Start with our free, ad-supported plan. Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock full power features with Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Choose an app plan, add data packs for yourself, or share data with your family — all from one place.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Start with our free, ad-supported plan. Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock full power features with Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even when you’re away from Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Create a shared data pool for your family and manage everyone’s usage from one place.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Add global data to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country and currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: High-speed data subject to fair-use and network management policies

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
disclaimer.fairUse: High-speed data may be subject to fair-use limits, local network conditions, and regional availability.

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Small pack
small.bestFor: Best for short trips and light messaging.

medium.title: Medium pack
medium.bestFor: Best for everyday messaging, maps, and light media.

large.title: Large pack
large.bestFor: Best for longer trips and heavier app use.

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Share a single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB of shared high-speed data — great for 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs create or top up a shared data pool. You can invite and remove members anytime.
family.footnote: Family packs share a single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability and limits depend on your country and local regulations.

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.

family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.

3.title: Local 3 GB
3.desc: 3 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across your selected country.

5.title: Local 5 GB

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone new instantly, or choose to chat with Ria.
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.

randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats can be saved
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.

ria.intro: Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. What’s on your mind?

greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 What would you like to talk about today?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}! I’m all ears — what’s up?

greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want to vent, ask, or just chat?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would you like to talk about?

greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else you wanted to add?
greetings.short3: Back again, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me what’s on your mind.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready to pick up where we left off?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}! Got something new on your mind?

account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
account.a: Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Yes. Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted by default. Only you and the recipient can read them.

translate.a: Enable “Auto-translate” in Settings → Appearance & Language. We translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs with minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots and your app version.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: New to Chatforia? This quick start shows the essentials so you can be productive in minutes.

alert.text: This guide will grow as we launch new features. If something’s missing, let us know via

section1.title: 1) Create your account
section1.prefsStart: In the app, open Settings to set your preferences

section2.title: 2) Start messaging
section2.item1: Create a DM or Group and send your first message.
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Go further
section3.item1: You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime inside the app.
section3.item2: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.
section3.item2Part1: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.

howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.

safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one of the most important tools for communication in today’s world. From personal conversations to business interactions, messaging apps allow people to stay connected instantly and efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely on messaging apps for daily communication with friends, family, and colleagues. Whether it's a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus on giving users control over their data and conversations. Features like encryption, privacy settings, and message controls allow users to communicate with confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues to evolve with new features such as AI-powered responses, translation, and multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even more powerful and versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built with these principles in mind, offering a fast, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience for a connected world.

global.title: The Future of Global Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once required phone calls or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, and more inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One of the biggest changes in communication is the reduction of geographic barriers. People can now connect with others across the world in near real time. Whether for personal conversations, business, or collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far less limiting.
global.translationDesc: Language has traditionally been one of the biggest obstacles to global communication. Today, built-in translation tools help bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users to communicate more easily even if they speak different languages, creating new opportunities for connection and understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect messages to be delivered quickly, and modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables more natural and fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes more digital, privacy and security are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like encryption and user-controlled settings help support a more secure communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future of global communication will likely include more advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved translation, and enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue to become more intuitive and accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, helping people connect more easily across languages and borders.

index.title: Chatforia Blog
index.intro: Explore insights on communication, online safety, and how messaging technology is connecting people around the world.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia is a secure, multilingual messenger with end-to-end encryption, instant translation, and voice/video calling. Our mission is simple: help people connect—safely, privately, and across languages.

values.control: Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts are optional.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language chat effortless. Messages are end-to-end encrypted by default, and built-in translation supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can enable disappearing messages, keep read receipts optional, and sync across devices. Available on iOS, Android, and the web.
press.scanTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.

advertise.title: Advertise with Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging users with tasteful, brand-safe placements. We offer banner inventory in high-visibility spots, sponsorships, and house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: We also serve inventory via Google AdSense. You can target Chatforia with publisher ID {{pubId}}, or use the form below for direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: We also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are available—use the form below.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about your campaign and we’ll recommend placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency and dwell time in chat UI
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Start a Chat” modal) available
why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive to provide a high-quality service to all users. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time through your account settings or the platform used to purchase.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Purchases
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as the Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated

optOut.title: How users opt out
optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.

help.title: Help
help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email

privacyTerms.title: Privacy & Terms
privacyTerms.bodyStart: By consenting to SMS, users also agree to our
